subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Throne, adorned with the remembrance of thy Lord and sanctified from all else. By My life, this is better for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی العرش و کان مطرزا بذکر ربک و مقدسا عما سویه لعمری انه خیر لک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
